Based on the web search results, the closure of the Lava Jato task force in 2021 was ordered by **Augusto Aras**, who was the Procurador-Geral da República (Attorney General of Brazil) at the time. The decision was officially announced on February 3, 2021, and involved the redistribution of ongoing cases that were being handled by the specialized task force in Paraná.
response_no_search:
The closure of the Lava Jato task force in 2021 was ordered by **Augusto Aras**, then Attorney General of the Republic (Procurador-Geral da República) of Brazil. The decision was formalized through an ordinance (Portaria nº 1.562/2021) issued on September 15, 2021, which terminated the specialized task force and redistributed its remaining investigations to other prosecutors within the Federal Public Ministry (MPF).

1. **Political and Institutional Shifts**: Aras, appoi
